source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Two tanks contain steam and they are both connected to a piston/cylinder. Initially the piston is at the bottom, and the mass of the piston is such that a pressure of 1.4 MPa below it will be able to lift it. Stream in A is 4 kg at 7 MPa, 700\circ\text{C} and B has 2 kg at 3 MPa, 350\circ\text{C}. The two valves are opened, and the water comes to a uniform state. Find the total entropy generation, assuming no heat transfer.
